title: Horror +
description: Take the horror to a next level... (Fabric 1.20.1)
body:
### Take the horror to the next level…

**Horror+** is a Fabric modpack that brings the horror experience to Minecraft.

It focuses on atmosphere, exploration, and survival.  
The world may look calm during the day, but something is always watching.

It features:

- **Enhanced terrain generation**
- **New biomes**
- **New hostile mobs**
- **New structures**
- **Corrupted entities**

Your goal is simple: **survive for as long as possible**.  
Days may feel peaceful, but nights are never safe.


---

### Multiplayer & Server support (NEW)

Horror+ now includes **official server support**.

A dedicated **Horror+ Server modpack** is available, allowing you to play multiplayer with the exact same experience.  
The server version is designed specifically for Fabric servers and is **not intended to be used as a client modpack**.

You have **3 official options** to play Horror+ in multiplayer:

**1. Pre-configured server (recommended)**  
Download the [fully pre-configured Horror+ server](https://rdr.one/dwrXuLl) and follow the tutorial provided in the Google Drive.  
This is the fastest option if you want a **free** ready-to-run server.

**2. Server modpack**  
Download the **[Horror+ Server modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/horror+server)**, extract it, and copy the `mods` folder into your Fabric server directory.
  

**3. Mods folder only**  
Download the mods folder [here](https://rdr.one/3GC30fN).  
Then place the `mods` folder directly into your Fabric server directory.

➡ For **full installation steps, hosting details, and Modrinth Hosting requirements**, see the **Horror+ Server page**:  
https://modrinth.com/project/horror+server    


---

### Hosting options 

You can host the Horror+ server **yourself for free**, directly on your own hardware.  
Performance will depend on your setup.  
⚠ Less than **16 GB RAM**, a **weak CPU**, or a **poor internet connection** may cause lag or crashes.

You can also use a **paid hosting provider**, which is generally simpler and avoids network configuration:

- **[BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/clients/aff.php?aff=6703)** :  
  Starting at ~$16, recommended at least **6 GB RAM**

- **[Modrinth Hosting](https://modrinth.com/hosting#plan)** :  
  Recommended at least **6 GB RAM**

⚠ For advanced configuration and host-specific requirements, always refer to the **Horror+ Server page**.

---

### Support

If you encounter a bug, join the Discord server, accept the rules, go to **Help**, and send a message describing your issue while pinging **@amilex**.
